titleStmt.title: SII 23.433: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 433. (A.R. No. 433 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājasiṁhēśvara temple—on the same wall Jaṭ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya: year 6

summary.p: This records the gift of the proceeds of imposts levied on certain export articles of merchandise like yarn, cloth, arecanut, pepper, turmeric and ginger, by the padiṉeṇvishayattār of Nālunagaram and the taragar (brokers) assembled in the tiruvōlakka-maṇḍapam of the temple of Tiruppūlānduṟai-uḍaiya-Nāyaṉār to meet the requirements of the śā tuppaḍi and tirupparivaṭṭam (apparel) of the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ—
śrīkoṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiyate vaṟku yāṇṭu 6vatu mārkaḻimātam 10 5 tiyati Uṭaiyār tiruppūlāntuṟai yuṭaiyaṉāyaṉār koyilil tiruvolakka maṇṭapattil nālu nakarattu patiṉeṇ m tarakarum ṉiṟaivaṟaṉiṟaiyntu kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiru ntu Iṉṉāyanāṟkku cāttuppaṭikkum tirupparivaṭṭattukkum tiruk kaimalaril nirvārttuk kaṭṭikkuṭuttu Eṭukkumpaṭi kiḻaivaṭamaiyil patiṉeṇviṣayattārk kiḻakku
kuyoru māppaṇamum ṉūlpiṭavai vukku yoru kācum kiḻakkup pokum pākkum miḷaku mañcaḷ cukku Uḷḷiṭṭa mārppukku pata kkukku melpaṭṭa mā yoru kācum Āka yivvakaippaṭi candrādi ttavaṟ cella tirumalaiyi mpilum veṭṭik koḷvatāka tirukkai malaril nirvārttuk kuṭuttom nālu nakarattup patiṉeṇviṣayat tomum tarakarum Ivvaṉaivarumñ colla yippiṭipāṭu Eḻutiṉa maikku patiṉeṇviṣayakkaṇakku tirukkaivel
Digital edition of SII 23.433 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
